queries.question: What type of questions are common to all exams?
queries.sql: SELECT Type_Of_Question.questionType  from Exam_Type_Of_Question join Type_Of_Question on Exam_Type_Of_Question.questionTypeID = Type_Of_Question.id join Exam on Exam_Type_Of_Question.examID = Exam.id   GROUP BY Exam_Type_Of_Question.questionTypeID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Exam_Type_Of_Question.examID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Exam)

queries.question: Show me the types of questions every exam asks.
queries.sql: select exam.examname , type_of_question.questiontype from Exam_Type_Of_Question join Type_Of_Question on Exam_Type_Of_Question.questionTypeID = Type_Of_Question.id join Exam on Exam_Type_Of_Question.examID = Exam.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?examname ?questiontype WHERE {
  ?exam_type_of_question a :Exam_Type_Of_Question .
  ?type_of_question a :Type_Of_Question .
  ?exam_type_of_question p:hasType_Of_Question ?type_of_question .
  ?exam a :Exams .
  ?exam_type_of_question p:hasExam ?exam .
  ?exam p:examName ?examname .
  ?type_of_question p:questionType ?questiontype .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show me the types of questions every exam asks.
